notes: Codex's headless `codex exec` is single-shot. Phases assert: (1) proc-PID pre-session born in ready, (2) rollout session reconciled (new session_id) with invariant 'no state_transition to waiting' over the rollout's lifetime, (3) process_exited fires on the same rollout session. Variants 2/3 (SIGKILL) require driver-level sigkill that codex's interactive driver does not currently expose.

text: Variant 1: pre-session appears in ready within 1s
Variant 1: rollout session reconciles (different session_id); never enters waiting through end of recording
Variant 1: clean exit — process_exited fires on the rollout session (same session_id as v1_handoff)
